MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Denis Kenny, Esq. of Scherer, Smith & Kenny, 415-433-1099 and Richard Levine, Esq. of Levine & Baker, 415-391-8177 moving to be relieved as counsel for plaintiff and opposing party
Steven Taylor, Esq. of Keker & Van Nest, 415-391-5400 for defendant and opposing party Squire Sanders & Demsey

RULING:
MATTER WAS NOT ARGUED and the Court GRANTED Denis Kenny, Esq. of Scherer, Smith & Kenny and co-counsel Steven Taylor, Esq. of Keker & Van Nes's Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel FOR PLAINTIF, LOUIS GENZANO. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR 8189. (301/PJB)
